feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Do we have the relevant S4 HANA standard V2/V4 API for the BAPI "BAPI_ACC_ACTIVITY_ALLOC_POST"?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

As part of clean core methodology we need to implement the similar call of posting the activity hours on WBS timesheet in S4 from CPI. A similar BAPI "BAPI_ACC_ACTIVITY_ALLOC_POST" is there but wanted to know do we have the relevant S4 HANA standard V2/V4 API for similar BAPI functionality?

Thanks,

Ahmed

entry.title: Fetch SAP HANA DB table data in ABAP using SQL Scripts
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to fetch data from HANA DB by calling SQL script from an ABAP program and send the result to the concerned person via email.

 

SELECT * FROM "SYS" . "USERS" WHERE USER_DEACTIVATED='FALSE'

 

This will be an automated process (Background job)

Please help with the code.

Thanks & Regards,
Nitin

#HANA DB, SQL

entry.title: Error updating ADT in Eclipse 2023-09
entry.content:
I have received attached error when updating ABAP Development Tools in Eclipse Version: 2023-09 (4.29.0).

The update was not successful due to missing dependency tools for each tools. 

Also downloaded 2024-06 and 2024-09 version and tried to install ADT by referring https://tools.eu1.hana.ondemand.com/ but faced same issue.

Is there any workaround for this?

or we have to wait until it is fixed. Any idea when it will be solved?

entry.title: Screen field value wasn't passed into search help import parameter
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

For the following material batch search help, I can't get material number (MATNR), which was input in the screen, in the search help function exit. What could be reason of the issue? 

Field MATNR and CHARG (batch) are in the same screen structure.

Regards,

Eric

entry.title: SAP + OpenText for ABAPers
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I had bought and completed a course named " OpenText Extended Enterprise Content Management " in UDEMY.

It is 4 hour online course and there is no mention of SAP or ABAP in the entire course.

There is one more course called SAP Vendor Invoice Management(VIM) by OpenText which I think is for Functional Consultants ( MM ).

I am an experienced ABAP Consultant and would like to know what would be the appropriate course for ABAPers when it comes to OpenText.

And also what is xECM ? Is it also related to OpenText ?

Kindly share your expertise in this area.

Thanks,
K.Kiran

entry.title: Examples or demos for the Open-source ABAP2XLSX library
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I understand that the open-source ABAP2XLSX library provides enhanced flexibility in formatting and content control when exporting data to Excel. With ABAP2XLSX, we can handle cell colors, borders, and other Excel features that are not supported by the standard ALV Excel download functionality. Could you please share any available examples or demos showcasing these capabilities?

Thank you.

entry.title: ABAP RAP: How to call the default function with multiple instance
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to add some specify logic to determine default value with multiple instance, only if all selected instances have the same status, then the default value can be determined, otherwise, the value should be empty.
I have added annotation @ui.lineItem: [{ type: #FOR_ACTION, dataAction: 'ChangeStatus', invocationGrouping: #CHANGE_SET }] in metadata extensions, I found that all methods are called as a group except the default function.

How could I implement this requirement?

Best Regards,
Wei

entry.title: How to Enable SolMan Incident Approval Directly from Email in SAP Solution Manager?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In SAP Solution Manager, when a user creates a ticket, an email notification is automatically sent to the department manager for approval. Currently, the department manager needs to log into SAP Solution Manager to change the ticket status from 'Open' to 'Release.'

I want to enhance this process so that the department manager can approve the ticket directly from the email notification itself. Specifically, when the manager clicks 'Approve' in the email, the ticket status in SAP Solution Manager should automatically update from 'Open' to 'Release.'

My questions are:

  1. How can I integrate this functionality with the email triggered by SAP Solution Manager?

  2. Is it feasible to implement this kind of email-based approval within SAP Solution Manager?

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

entry.title: UI5 not installing in eclipse
entry.content: There are shows like this during the installation of UI5 Tools. what should I do now?

entry.title: Import transport of 3rd party product into RISE / PCE
entry.content:
Hello,

what is the process of importing transport of 3rd party product into SAP RISE system?

do we need SAP approval?

Can we (system integrator or customer) add transports to the system ourselves or sap needs to do it?

our customer is stuck in a limbo and I can’t find clear answers anywhere.

Anyone with experience doing this please pitch in.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to update the train station field for vendor using BAPI for mass update.
entry.content: In the 'BP' T-Code, there is a field BAHNS (Train Station) in the Vendor: General Data tab. I couldn't find any BAPI for this BAHNS field. If a BAPI exists, please suggest one. If no BAPI is available, please help me by providing steps to extend the BAPI for the standard BAHNS field, as I couldn't find any steps for extending a standard field in a BAPI.

entry.title: Field-symbol gets unassigned unexpectedly.
entry.content:
Hi, has anyone experienced that the field-symbol gets unassigned unexpectedly?

Here's my code

ASSIGN IT_TABLE [ ... ] TO FIELD SYMBOL <FS_TEST>.

IF <FS_TEST> IS ASSIGNED.

ENDIF.

DATA(V_VAR1) = <FS_TEST>-EBELN.   <-------------- I'm encountering an error here. Because the <FS_TEST gets unassigned even though there was no UNASSIGN logic inside the IF ENDIF condition.

How do I resolve that?

entry.title: Transfer data from one internal table to another without loop with some conditions
entry.content:
Hi, I have two internal table it_tab1 , it_tab2 of same structure I 1000 record in it_tab1. Now on based on some condition I want to move some records into it_tab2.
I can move this with help of loop but don't want to use loop if anyone can help or suggest some other way then please answer.

entry.title: The Assert Condition was violated (Short Dump)
entry.content:
Hi,
I am in SAP S4 Hana system and I am getting a dump called "ASSERTION_FAILED".
Application Component: FI-GL-GL

I tried to get the trace file from ST11 t-code and found the below error: 


**** Versions SAP-REL 793,0,51 RFC-VER U 3 LATEST_CHANGE MT-SL
======> The ASSERT condition was violated.
ABAP Programm: CL_FINS_PRED_AIF_REPROCESS====CP (Transaction: )
Called function module: FINS_PRED_REPROCESS

Can anyone please help me rectifying this dump. 

 

Thanks,
SS

entry.title: Internal Pricing Error after using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am creating a goods movement whenever changes in the SD meet certain conditions using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE in user exit MV45AFZZ - USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE.

I am not passing any price or pricing conditions to BAPI. However, I am getting an popup message STOP - Internal Pricing Error.

This could be because the PRICING_REFRESH function module has been called up in the BAPI, even though you did not require it.

Please provide your valuable inputs.

Best Regards,

Nicole

entry.title: How to find a proper TableType for retrieving data of et_data parameter of a specific node of BOPF?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm newbie using BOPF, and I'm trying to fetch data of BO_TRQ_ROOT node of SCMTMS/TOR BOPF with a given key (eg. '5BE50B5E43BC1EDEA4F125..........')

I am using retrieve_by_association method of get_service_manager, but not able to find a proper TableType which I can use for declaring a Table Type for the retrieved data of et_data parameter then I get the next short dump: 

I tried to use inline declaration with like DATA(lt_tretrieved_data) but its not allowed and it says:  "ET_DATA" has a generic type that cannot be used for declarations.

It'd be nice if someone have any documentation about it.

This is my code:

 

 

DATA: ls_key TYPE /bobf/s_frw_key,
      lt_key TYPE /bobf/t_frw_key.
DATA: lt_root_trq TYPE  /bobf/t_atf_document_k.

DATA(lo_srv_mgr) = /bobf/cl_tra_serv_mgr_factory=>get_service_manager(
                       /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_bo_key ). 
       
	" More logic here....
LOOP AT lt_tor_root INTO DATA(wa_tor_item).
  "ls_key-key    = '5BE50B5E43BC1EDEA4......'.
  ls_key-key    = wa_tor_item-key.
  APPEND ls_key TO lt_key.
ENDLOOP.

 lo_srv_mgr->retrieve_by_association(
          EXPORTING
            iv_node_key    = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_node-root
            it_key         = lt_key
            iv_association = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_association-root-bo_trq_root
            iv_fill_data   = abap_true
          IMPORTING
            et_data        = lt_root_trq  “ How can I know which type this should be…?
          EXCEPTIONS
            OTHERS         = 1 ).

 

 

Hoping anyone can give me a hand, since I'm stucked here and can't continue..

Thanks in adavance.. have a good one!!

entry.title: File Upload option not showing in SAP RAP Application
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on a File upload Scenario using RAP and I could not see Upload button for the Attachment field, instead it is showing as an Input field in object page when clicked on create.  I have followed implementation referring to the below link.

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/working-with-large-objects 

Attachment table

 

define table zlist_att {

  key client : abap.clnt not null;
  key uuid   : char32 not null;
  listno     : abap.char(6) not null;
  attachment : zattachement_inv;
  mimetype   : abap.char(128);
  filename   : abap.char(128);
  comments   : abap.char(200);

}

 


DTEL - ZATTACHEMENT_INV

Interface view code

 

define view entity ZI_LIST_ATT
  as select from zlist_att
  association to parent ZI_LIST_TABLE as _list on $projection.listno = _list.Listno
{
  key uuid,
      listno,

      @Semantics.largeObject:{
        contentDispositionPreference: #INLINE,
        fileName: 'Filename',
        acceptableMimeTypes: [ 'text/csv','application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet' ],
        mimeType: 'MimeType'
      }
      attachment,
      @Semantics.mimeType: true
      mimetype as MimeType,
      filename as Filename,
      comments,
      
     _list.Lastchangedat as Lastchangedat,
     
      _list

entry.title: Fund center and commitment items fields disappear in CJ20N network header.
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I was given a requirement that Funds management integration with Project system for budget control purpose. 

Configured accordingly in "Maintain Field Status for Assigning FM Account Assignments" for Network header with Fund center and commitment item as required fields. 

A tab " UPDATE FUNDSMANAGEMNT'' appeared in CJ20N network header under "Assignments'' tab.

But there are no fields to update the fund center and commitment items.

The derivation rules are 1. WBS=Commitment item 2. Profit center = Fund center, derivation rules are working fine in FB50 manual input for WBS and Profit center. 

Kindly advise!

Reg

Balakrishna Pathuri

Yash Technologies Pvt Ltd.

entry.title: Re: ABAP class/FM/BAPI/IDOC to create/maintain Inbound De...
entry.content:
I have come across a solution to create an Inbound delivery in EWM using an ABAP program. Debugging the standard T-code "/SCWM/PRDI" felt overly complex, so I shifted to creating the inbound delivery using IDoc test transaction WE19 (IDoc type: SHP_IBDLV_SAVE_REPLICA). The delivery was successfully created through the IDoc, which led me to debug the IDoc function module "/SCWM/IDOC_INPUT_IBDLV_SAVEREP".

During this process, I identified a class "/scwm/cl_mapin_id_savereplica". This class is used in the IDoc function module for inbound delivery creation (specifically for delivery save replica).

Additionally, when I examined the function group of this IDoc FM, I found a wrapper Function Module (FM: /SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA) for creating EWM Inbound Deliveries. This FM uses the same class and approach as the IDoc. After numerous experiments and setbacks, I successfully figured out how to make this Function Module work independently to create Inbound Deliveries in an EWM Decentralized system. This FM would only work if it is called externally, i.e., in an update task with qRFC. I'll be writing a blog post soon that explains the program and process in detail, as I believe many are seeking a similar solution.

entry.title: How do you reverse engineer a JSON or API end-point to get the data TYPE you need in ABAP?
entry.content:
I am doing some work to connect to an API using an ABAP HTTP Client. How do I get the data structure to populate and send?

Note: I am working on an ECC system so I might not have access to all solutions proposed.

At this point I have reverse engineered the JSON (building a series of TYPES and putting them together) in a test program until it matches so now I know what the data structure is and how to populate it. 

When I worked with web services in the past we could upload the XSD file for the destination when we want to send data, and that XSD file would generate the ABAP data structures which worked really well.

There must be an easier way to do this. I would appreciated comments from people who have done this and can give advice. I am not a big fan of the "have you tried this?" brigade that are in fact only guessing.

Any experienced advisor would be appreciated.
